episode.title: The Mechanics of a Quiet, Fast Bike

feed.description: Mountain biking talk: trails, technique, gear, and the people who build the ride.
feed.title: Singletrack Sessions

bullets: Welcome back to Singletrack Sessions. Today we're talking about drivetrain mechanics, and I'm joined by Noah Bryer, mechanic at Spoke & Wrench. Noah Bryer, thanks for being here.
Before we get into it — Sophie Lorent was on last episode talking about tire pressure mattering more than suspension tweaks.
Yeah, exactly. And it ties into what we're covering today.
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Singletrack Sessions. Today we're talking about drivetrain mechanics, and I'm joined by Noah Bryer, mechanic at Spoke & Wrench. Noah Bryer, thanks for being here.
summary.title: The Mechanics of a Quiet, Fast Bike
